name: OCR
description: OCR text recognition library using Tesseract

OCR Text From Image.name: OCR Text From Image
OCR Text From Image.description: Recognize text from an image file

Click Text.name: Click Text
Click Text.description: Click on text found on screen

Get Text Coordinates.name: Get Text Coordinates
Get Text Coordinates.description: Get coordinates and dimensions of text on screen

Set OCR Language.name: Set OCR Language
Set OCR Language.description: Set OCR language for subsequent operations

Set OCR Confidence.name: Set OCR Confidence
Set OCR Confidence.description: Set minimum confidence threshold for text detection

Get OCR Data.name: Get OCR Data
Get OCR Data.description: Get detailed OCR data from screen region

OCR Multi Language.name: OCR Multi Language
OCR Multi Language.description: Run OCR with multiple Tesseract language packs

OCR With Confidence.name: OCR With Confidence
OCR With Confidence.description: Run OCR and return each word with its confidence score

Compare Images.name: Compare Images
Compare Images.description: Compare two images and return a similarity score

Read Barcode.name: Read Barcode
Read Barcode.description: Decode barcodes and QR codes from an image
